targetTranslation: a straight path (description of هُدًى - guidance)
ayahArabic: لِّكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ جَعَلْنَا مَنسَكًا هُمْ نَاسِكُوهُ فَلَا يُنٰزِعُنَّكَ فِى ٱلْأَمْرِ وَٱدْعُ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ إِنَّكَ لَعَلَىٰ هُدًى مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: For every [religious] community We have appointed rites which they perform. So, [O Muḥammad], let them [i.e., the disbelievers] not contend with you over the matter but invite [them] to your Lord. Indeed, you are upon straight guidance.

ayahArabic: وَإِن جٰدَلُوكَ فَقُلِ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allāh is most knowing of what you do.

ayahArabic: وَإِن جٰدَلُوكَ فَقُلِ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allāh is most knowing of what you do.

ayahArabic: وَإِن جٰدَلُوكَ فَقُلِ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allāh is most knowing of what you do.

targetTranslation: you (all) work/act/do (in response to what they argue/dispute)
ayahArabic: وَإِن جٰدَلُوكَ فَقُلِ ٱللَّهُ أَعْلَمُ بِمَا تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allāh is most knowing of what you do.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

targetTranslation: between you all (in يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ - He judges between you all)
ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَحْكُمُ بَيْنَكُمْ يَوْمَ ٱلْقِيٰمَةِ فِيمَا كُنتُمْ فِيهِ تَخْتَلِفُونَ
ayahEnglish: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَعْلَمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّ ذٰلِكَ فِى كِتٰبٍ إِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: Do you not know that Allāh knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allāh, is easy.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ تَعْلَمْ أَنَّ ٱللَّهَ يَعْلَمُ مَا فِى ٱلسَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ إِنَّ ذٰلِكَ فِى كِتٰبٍ إِنَّ ذٰلِكَ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ يَسِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: Do you not know that Allāh knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allāh, is easy.

ayahEnglish: Do you not know that Allāh knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allāh, is easy.

targetTranslation: he knows (what is in السَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)

ayahEnglish: Do you not know that Allāh knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allāh, is easy.

ayahArabic: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يُنَزِّلْ بِهِۦ سُلْطٰنًا وَمَا لَيْسَ لَهُم بِهِۦ عِلْمٌ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahArabic: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يُنَزِّلْ بِهِۦ سُلْطٰنًا وَمَا لَيْسَ لَهُم بِهِۦ عِلْمٌ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahArabic: وَيَعْبُدُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ مَا لَمْ يُنَزِّلْ بِهِۦ سُلْطٰنًا وَمَا لَيْسَ لَهُم بِهِۦ عِلْمٌ وَمَا لِلظَّالِمِينَ مِن نَّصِيرٍ
ayahEnglish: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتُنَا بَيِّنٰتٍ تَعْرِفُ فِى وُجُوهِ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ ٱلْمُنكَرَ يَكَادُونَ يَسْطُونَ بِٱلَّذِينَ يَتْلُونَ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَايٰتِنَا قُلْ أَفَأُنَبِّئُكُم بِشَرٍّ مِّن ذٰلِكُمُ ٱلنَّارُ وَعَدَهَا ٱللَّهُ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ وَبِئْسَ ٱلْمَصِيرُ
ayahEnglish: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, you recognize in the faces of those who disbelieve disapproval. They are almost on the verge of assaulting those who recite to them Our verses. Say, "Then shall I inform you of [what is] worse than that? [It is] the Fire which Allāh has promised those who disbelieve, and wretched is the destination."

targetTranslation: was struck/given (as an example to مَثَلٌ)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلنَّاسُ ضُرِبَ مَثَلٌ فَٱسْتَمِعُوا۟ لَهُۥٓ إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ تَدْعُونَ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ لَن يَخْلُقُوا۟ ذُبَابًا وَلَوِ ٱجْتَمَعُوا۟ لَهُۥ وَإِن يَسْلُبْهُمُ ٱلذُّبَابُ شَيْـًٔا لَّا يَسْتَنقِذُوهُ مِنْهُ ضَعُفَ ٱلطَّالِبُ وَٱلْمَطْلُوبُ
ayahEnglish: O people, an example is presented, so listen to it. Indeed, those you invoke besides Allāh will never create [as much as] a fly, even if they gathered together for it [i.e., that purpose]. And if the fly should steal from them a [tiny] thing, they could not recover it from him. Weak are the pursuer and pursued.

targetTranslation: they measured/estimated correctly (subject of negation ما)
ayahArabic: مَا قَدَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَقَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
ayahEnglish: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal. Indeed, Allāh is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

ayahArabic: مَا قَدَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَقَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ

targetTranslation: Allah (the one true God being acted upon)
ayahArabic: مَا قَدَرُوا۟ ٱللَّهَ حَقَّ قَدْرِهِۦٓ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ لَقَوِىٌّ عَزِيزٌ
ayahEnglish: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal. Indeed, Allāh is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

ayahEnglish: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal. Indeed, Allāh is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَصْطَفِى مِنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh chooses from the angels messengers and from the people. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Seeing.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَصْطَفِى مِنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ
ayahEnglish: Allāh chooses from the angels messengers and from the people. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Seeing.

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَصْطَفِى مِنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

ayahArabic: ٱللَّهُ يَصْطَفِى مِنَ ٱلْمَلٰٓئِكَةِ رُسُلًا وَمِنَ ٱلنَّاسِ إِنَّ ٱللَّهَ سَمِيعٌۢ بَصِيرٌ

ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
ayahEnglish: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allāh will be returned [all] matters.

targetTranslation: that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
ayahArabic: يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَإِلَى ٱللَّهِ تُرْجَعُ ٱلْأُمُورُ
ayahEnglish: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allāh will be returned [all] matters.

targetTranslation: between (what is in front of them)

ayahEnglish: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allāh will be returned [all] matters.

ayahEnglish: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allāh will be returned [all] matters.

targetTranslation: those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

targetTranslation: they believed (referring to the believers being addressed)
ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

ayahArabic: يٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ ٱرْكَعُوا۟ وَٱسْجُدُوا۟ وَٱعْبُدُوا۟ رَبَّكُمْ وَٱفْعَلُوا۟ ٱلْخَيْرَ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُفْلِحُونَ
ayahEnglish: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

ayahArabic: وَجٰهِدُوا۟ فِى ٱللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِۦ هُوَ ٱجْتَبَىٰكُمْ وَمَا جَعَلَ عَلَيْكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ مِنْ حَرَجٍ مِّلَّةَ أَبِيكُمْ إِبْرٰهِيمَ هُوَ سَمَّىٰكُمُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ مِن قَبْلُ وَفِى هٰذَا لِيَكُونَ ٱلرَّسُولُ شَهِيدًا عَلَيْكُمْ وَتَكُونُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱعْتَصِمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَوْلَىٰ وَنِعْمَ ٱلنَّصِيرُ
ayahEnglish: And strive for Allāh with the striving due to Him. He has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty. [It is] the religion of your father, Abraham. He [i.e., Allāh] named you "Muslims" before [in former scriptures] and in this [revelation] that the Messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people. So establish prayer and give zakāh and hold fast to Allāh. He is your protector; and excellent is the protector, and excellent is the helper.

ayahArabic: وَجٰهِدُوا۟ فِى ٱللَّهِ حَقَّ جِهَادِهِۦ هُوَ ٱجْتَبَىٰكُمْ وَمَا جَعَلَ عَلَيْكُمْ فِى ٱلدِّينِ مِنْ حَرَجٍ مِّلَّةَ أَبِيكُمْ إِبْرٰهِيمَ هُوَ سَمَّىٰكُمُ ٱلْمُسْلِمِينَ مِن قَبْلُ وَفِى هٰذَا لِيَكُونَ ٱلرَّسُولُ شَهِيدًا عَلَيْكُمْ وَتَكُونُوا۟ شُهَدَآءَ عَلَى ٱلنَّاسِ فَأَقِيمُوا۟ ٱلصَّلَوٰةَ وَءَاتُوا۟ ٱلزَّكَوٰةَ وَٱعْتَصِمُوا۟ بِٱللَّهِ هُوَ مَوْلَىٰكُمْ فَنِعْمَ ٱلْمَوْلَىٰ وَنِعْمَ ٱلنَّصِيرُ
